name: Thiirchel
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) female wearing a lower-class shirt with light boots. May also wear a light helmet, shield, gauntlets, and additional light armor pieces. Carries spare lower-class pants and shoes. Wields an enchanted mace.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: battlemage, criminal, hostile, aggressive, cave dweller
Role: Thiirchel is a battlemage hiding out with her criminal partners in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. She knows standard battlemage spells as well as an additional major Destruction spell, combining magical prowess with her enchanted mace in combat. She carries a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. She remains in one of the first chambers of the cave.
Daily Routine: Thiirchel stays in her chamber of the cave at all times, never sleeping or eating. She remains vigilant and ready for combat.
Personality - The Cave Battlemage: Thiirchel is hostile and attacks intruders on sight without warning. She will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
